title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_grep
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_grep' MCP tool.

root.description: Repo path, array of paths, or "*" for all MCP roots.

pattern.description: Content-search pattern (basic regex), always passed as `-e <pattern>`. Required unless `pickaxe` is set.

pickaxe.description: When set, run pickaxe history search instead of content grep. Returns `commits[]` (sha + subject) per root.

mode.description: `S` = pickaxe string (`git log -S`); `G` = pickaxe regex (`git log -G`).

term.description: Search term / regex for pickaxe history.

ref.description: Commit/branch/tag: content mode searches that tree; pickaxe mode limits history to that tip. Must be a safe ref token.

paths.description: Limit search to these paths (must resolve within the repo root).

filesOnly.description: List matching file paths only (`-l`), omitting line/text detail. Content mode only.

maxMatches.description: Max matches/files/commits per root (hard cap 1000, default 200).
